Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Florence A. McClain of WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & McCALL, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / moving party Qualitex Company
Bryn Gallagher Letsch of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Woodrow Thomas

RULING:
DEFENDANT QUALITEX COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Qualitex Company's motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant failed to sustain its initial burden. Plaintiff's objections to Ava Campagna's declaration are sustained. Plaintiff's objections to defendant's Notice of Errata, which amended Ms. Campagna's declaration to include an attachment, are sustained. However, even if the court could consider Ms. Campagna's declaration, without or with its attachment, when considered together, plaintiff's deposition testimony and declaration, Ms. Campagna's declaration and defendant's responses to standard interrogatories create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing Sun Glow press pads attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to plaintiff's deposition testimony and declaration and to its own responses to standard interrogatories would be overruled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Cathy Meyer of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #11596 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
